title: The National Jute Board Act, 2008
full_text: The National Jute Board Act, 2008 राष्‍ट्रीय जूट बोर्ड अधिनियम, 2008 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200912 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 2009-02-12 Act Year: 2009 Short Title: The National Jute Board Act, 2008 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय जूट बोर्ड अधिनियम, 2008 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a National Jute Board for the development of the cultivation, manufacture and marketing of jute and jute products and for matters connected therewith and incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Textiles Notification: yet to be notified TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Jute Board Act, 2008 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL JUTE BOARD CHAPTER III FUNCTIONS OF THE BOARD CHAPTER IV PROPERTY AND CONTRACT CHAPTER V POWERS OF THE CENTRAL GOVERNMENT CHAPTER VI FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Licences, etc., to be deemed to have been granted to Board. Section 9. Tax exemption or benefits to continue have effect. Section 10. Guarantee to be operative. Section 11. Provisions in respect of officers and other employees of Council and Society. Section 12. Directions by Central Government. Section 13. Supersession of Board. Section 14.
